fallback_from.reason: non-PTY opencode run timed out after one reasonable bounded attempt with only partial edits

task.title: Backend provider timeout and bounded retry hardening
task.objective: Add narrow, configurable retry behavior for OpenAI-compatible LLM and TTS HTTP provider calls so transient timeout/5xx/429 failures get retried with bounded backoff instead of failing an entire segmentation or synthesis immediately.
acceptance_criteria: LLM and TTS providers parse optional max_retries and retry_backoff_ms values from provider options with safe defaults.
HTTP requests are retried only for transient transport errors, context deadline/client timeout errors, HTTP 429, and HTTP 5xx responses.
HTTP 4xx API errors other than 429 are not retried and still return provider error payload details.
Retry logic rebuilds request bodies safely for each attempt and does not log API keys or secrets.
Focused provider tests are added for retry success after a transient failure and no-retry behavior on non-retryable 4xx where feasible.
No unrelated frontend or backend architecture changes are made.
task.stop_condition: Stop after this bounded provider retry implementation and concise result summary; do not implement parser/OCR, segment cache, character KB, or unrelated UI changes.
validation: If go does not exist: record Go validation as blocked without installing Go.
